---
title: "random zeugs"
format: revealjs

---

## PF fidelity criteria

-   Problems affording multiple RSMs
-   Evidence for multiple RSM generation
-   Affective draw on the problem
-   Groupwork as the participation structure (p\<0.05)
-   Instruction building on the student solutions (p\<0.05)
-   Social surround facilitation (Problem-solving phase)
-   social surround facilitation (Instruction Phase)

<div style="text-align: right;font-size: 40%;">aus @sinha2021 lizensiert unter [CC-BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)</div>


## Bild

[![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/e/e1/CC_BY_icon.svg)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)

![](https://wiki.manjaro.org/images/1/18/Block-logo.png)

## Bibliographie
